tools.name: search_deals
tools.description: Search for currently active curated flight deals from Australia. Returns deals matching destination and/or price criteria. Deals are curated exceptional fares, not live inventory search.

tools.name: list_top_deals_from
tools.description: List the cheapest currently active flight deals from a specific Australian airport. Great for answering 'what's cheap from Melbourne right now?'

tools.name: get_deal
tools.description: Get full details for a specific flight deal including routes and airlines.
